title: Compliance: rust/lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs Schnorr48 implementation
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.3. File: rust/lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs. Status: COMPLIANT. Implements Schnorr48 per spec: sign() (L47-81) produces 48-byte e[16]||s[32] signature using deterministic nonce (SHA-512). verify() (L98-138) performs R' recovery, constant-time comparison, rejects identity/low-order/non-canonical points. sign_frame()/verify_frame() helpers correctly build signable data: epoch||seqnum||dst_addr||payload.
